subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him, the sovereign Lord, Whose majesty and authority over both king and subject no will can withstand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالکی را لایق و سزاست که شئونات و ارادت ملوک و مملوک او را از اراده منع
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
